things.name: Federation Square
things.description: Melbourne's cultural heart with galleries, restaurants and the Ian Potter Centre

things.name: Melbourne Laneways
things.description: Iconic graffiti-art laneways including Hosier Lane at the heart of Melbourne's culture

things.name: Great Ocean Road
things.description: Day trip to the Twelve Apostles limestone stacks on the wild Southern Ocean coast

things.name: Queen Victoria Market
things.description: Southern hemisphere's largest open-air market with fresh produce and deli hall

things.name: National Gallery of Victoria
things.description: Australia's oldest and most visited art museum with international and Australian art

things.name: Fitzroy & Collingwood
things.description: Bohemian inner suburbs with vintage shops, Brunswick Street cafes and rooftop bars

things.name: Melbourne Cricket Ground (MCG)
things.description: Australia's sporting cathedral - home of AFL and Test cricket, tours available

things.name: Yarra Valley & Dandenong Ranges
things.description: Wine region with Puffing Billy steam railway through mountain ash forest

things.name: Eureka Tower Skydeck
things.description: Observation deck on level 88 of the tallest residential building in the Southern Hemisphere

things.name: St Kilda Beach & Luna Park
things.description: Bayside suburb with a 1912 funfair, penguin colony and famous Sunday market
